name: Restore
official_rules_text: Some abilities, such as the Treat and Repair keywords or certain card effects, allow a player to Restore miniatures to allied units. To Restore a miniature to a unit, that unit must have had 1 or more miniatures defeated that Round. Choose a miniature that was defeated during the current Round and place that miniature on the battle/f_ield in Cohesion with its unit leader. Then, give that miniature a number of Wound tokens equal to 1 less than the Wound threshold indicated on its Upgrade Card or Unit Card.6304.21.2026 • Tokens section updated • Barricades callout updated• Area Terrain updated• Commanders and Checking for Panic callout updated• Null Courage updated•Standard Move updated • Silhouette section updated• Trooper section updated• Droid Trooper section updated• Heavy Trooper section added• Heavy Droid Trooper section added• Resiliency section updated• AI keyword updated• Complete the Mission keyword updated• Command Vehicle X keyword updated• Cunning keyword updated• Divine In/f_luence keyword updated• Eyes on the Prize keyword added.• Field Commander keyword updated• Guardian X keyword updated• Immune: Melee keyword updated•Mobile keyword updated • Mechanized Infantry keyword added• Override keyword updated• Shielded X keyword updated• Speeder X Compulsory Move section updated• Swashbuckler keyword added• Wheel Mode keyword updated• Fixed: Front/Sides/Read keyword updated• Arm X: Charge Token Type keyword updated• Detonate X: (Charge Type) keyword updated• Assault X keyword added•Long Shot keyword updated • Overwhelm keyword added• Sniper Team keyword added• Divulge keyword updated• Graﬃti Tokens section updatedCHANGE LOGDodge Token Standby Token Aim Token Wound Tokens Ion Token Objective Tokens Condition Tokens Order Tokens Panic Token Commander Token Vehicle Damage Tokens Active and Inactive Shield Tokens Charge Tokens Surge Token Smoke Token Observation Token Poison Token Poison Immobilize Token Immobilize Red and Blue Graffiti Tokens Bane Tokens Suppression Tokens Operative Marker Token
